text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Wait, is that claw a little on the weak side or
somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They cranked the difficulty up to the max, so ya
wouldn't get anythin' no matter how good ya are.
Yeah, that must be it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Put your wallet away! This thing's a sinkhole!
choice_data_list: Let me try one more time!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guh... No, don't do it! I can't stand seein'
perfectly good coins vanish before my eyes!
